prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年理科最低位次约86→71→62，呈持续前移趋势，近3年累计前移约24名，竞争逐年加剧；2025年基准位次约62名；本省理科计划2023– 2025年分别为5人、5人、2人，2025年缩至2人；2026年计划增至5人，较2025年大幅扩招150%，竞争显著缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科主榜2026年第5名 ，近年稳定在Top5，属全国顶尖高校；2026年声誉评价偏负面，涉及师德师风、学校管理及食堂宿舍等舆情事件；抖音热度排名第4（高热），短视频曝光量大 ，报考关注度仍处高位；2022年曾出现投档线异常信号（河南理科投档线暴跌），但近年已趋稳；复旦大学拥有中国语言文学A+、数学A+、新闻传播学A+、物理 学A+、生物学A+、政治学A+、马克思主义理论A+等大量A+/A/A-学科，综合实力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等工科专业持续高热推荐，与 复旦理科招生方向（工科试验班、理科试验班）高度契合；本省2026年考生总数约23.8万人，较2025年大幅增长，竞争加剧；复旦大学位于上海，对新疆考生吸引力较强；该校在全国招生规模稳定，新疆招生占比极小（约0.2%–0.9%），属跨省招生，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025 年基准位次62名、2026年理科计划从2人扩至5人（扩招150%）使竞争大幅缓解、本省考生总数显著增长部分抵消扩招效应、声誉偏负面小幅抑制报考热度，预测2026年理科最低位 次约116名，区间66–166名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（计算与智能领军人才班）（人工智能方向）
- 理科试验班（相辉学堂相辉计划）（数学/物理/化学/生物）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（集成电路领军人才班）（微电子/集成电路）
- 工科试验班（智能机器人与先进制造创新学院）（智能科学/力学/飞行器设计）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 工科试验班（智能电子信息班）（电子信息科学与技术）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年理科大幅扩招，位次预计后移至约116名，区间66–166名。位次在区间下限（66名以内）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业（人工智能、理科试验班）；位次在区间中段（66–116名 ）以二档为主、一档为辅；位次在区间上段（116–166名）建议二档保底、三档稳妥。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Science was approximately 86 → 71 → 62, showing a continuous upward trend, with a cumulative increase of about 24 places over the past three years, indicating intensifying competition; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 62; the provincial Science enrollment plan for 2023–2025 was 5, 5, and 2 respectively, with a reduction to 2 in 2025; the 2026 plan increases to 5, a significant expansion of 150% compared to 2025, greatly alleviating competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 5th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, consistently in the Top 5 in recent years, belonging to the top national universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving incidents related to teacher ethics, school management, and cafeteria/dormitory issues; Douyin popularity ranking 4th (high heat), with large short video exposure, maintaining high application attention; in 2022, there was an abnormal signal in the admission cutoff line (a sharp drop in Henan Science cutoff), but it has stabilized in recent years; Fudan University has a large number of A+/A/A- disciplines including Chinese Language and Literature A+, Mathematics A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Physics A+, Biology A+, Political Science A+, and Marxist Theory A+, demonstrating extremely strong comprehensive strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly recommended, closely aligning with Fudan's Science enrollment directions (Engineering Experimental Class, Science Experimental Class); the total number of examinees in the province for 2026 is about 238,000, a significant increase from 2025, intensifying competition; Fudan University is located in Shanghai, which has strong appeal to Xinjiang examinees; the university's national enrollment scale is stable, with a very small proportion in Xinjiang (about 0.2%–0.9%), making it a cross-provincial enrollment, with limited regional preference impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 62, the 2026 Science plan expansion from 2 to 5 (150% increase) greatly alleviating competition, the significant increase in the total number of examinees in the province partially offsetting the expansion effect, and the slightly negative reputation moderately suppressing application enthusiasm, the predicted 2026 Science minimum ranking is about 116, with a range of 66–166.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Computing and Intelligence Leading Talent Class) (Artificial Intelligence direction)
- Science Experimental Class (Xianghui Academy Xianghui Plan) (Mathematics/Physics/Chemistry/Biology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Integrated Circuit Leading Talent Class) (Microelectronics/Integrated Circuits)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Robotics and Advanced Manufacturing Innovation Academy) (Intelligent Science/Mechanics/Aircraft Design).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Electronic Information Class) (Electronic Information Science and Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, Science sees a significant expansion, with the ranking expected to shift back to about 116, range 66–166. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 66) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Artificial Intelligence, Science Experimental Class); those in the middle of the range (66–116) should prioritize Tier 2 with Tier 1 as supplement; those at the upper end of the range (116–166) are advised to use Tier 2 as a safety and Tier 3 as a stable choice.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023–2025年文科最低位次约45→43→88，2025年位次大幅后移约45名，波动较大；2025年基准位次约88名；本省文科计划2023–2025年分别为14 人、14人、20人，2025年扩至20人；2026年计划18人，较2025年缩招10%，竞争略有缓解。

prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学分化观望、新闻传播明显劝退、汉语言/中文推荐，与复旦文科招生专业（法学、新闻传播学类、经 济学类、中国语言文学类、社会科学试验班）部分方向热度分化；本省2026年考生总数约23.8万人，较2025年大幅增长，竞争加剧；复旦大学位于上海，对新疆考生吸引力较强；该校在全国招生规模稳定，新疆招生占比极小，属跨省招生，地域偏好影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次 88名、2026年文科计划从20人缩至18人（缩招10%）使竞争略有缓解、本省考生总数显著增长加剧竞争、声誉偏负面小幅抑制报考热度，预测2026年文科最低位次约85名，区间35– 135名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 法学（含法学-经济学、法学-人工智能双学士学位）
- 经济学类（金融学/经济学/国际经济与贸易等，含多个AI双学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 新闻传播学类（新闻学/传播学/广告学/广播电视学，含多个AI双学位）
- 中国语言文学类（汉语言文学/汉语言，含AI双学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）

- 社会科学试验班（社政学院）（社会学/社会工作，含AI双学位）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年文科小幅缩招，位次预计与2025年基本持平略前移至约85名，区间35–135名。位次在区间下限（35名以内）可重点冲刺一档专业（法学、经济学类）；位次在区间中段（3 5–85名）以二档为主、一档为辅；位次在区间上段（85–135名）建议二档保底、三档稳妥。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2023 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts was approximately 45 → 43 → 88, with a significant backward shift of about 45 places in 2025, indicating high volatility; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 88; the provincial liberal arts enrollment plan for 2023–2025 was 14, 14, and 20 students respectively, expanding to 20 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 18 students, a 10% reduction from 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 5th in the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, consistently in the Top 5 in recent years, belonging to the top national universities; the 2026 reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving public opinion on teacher ethics, school management, and dormitory cafeterias; Douyin popularity ranking is 4th (high heat), indicating still high application attention; in 2022, there was an abnormal signal in the admission score line (a sharp drop in Henan), and in 2023, the ranking of Journalism and Communication majors declined; Fudan University has a large number of A+/A/A- disciplines such as Chinese Language and Literature A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Philosophy A+, Political Science A+, Law A-, Applied Economics A, Sociology A, etc., with top-tier strength in liberal arts.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is diverging and wait-and-see, Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged, Chinese Language/Chinese is recommended, aligning with the differentiated popularity of some directions in Fudan's liberal arts enrollment majors (Law, Journalism and Communication, Economics, Chinese Language and Literature, Social Science Experimental Class); the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is about 238,000, a significant increase from 2025, intensifying competition; Fudan University is located in Shanghai, which has a strong attraction for Xinjiang students; the university's enrollment scale nationwide is stable, with a very small proportion in Xinjiang, making it a cross-provincial enrollment, and regional preference has limited impact.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 88, the 2026 liberal arts plan reduced from 20 to 18 (a 10% reduction) slightly easing competition, a significant increase in the total number of examinees in the province intensifying competition, and a slightly negative reputation moderately suppressing application enthusiasm, the predicted 2026 liberal arts minimum ranking is about 85, with a range of 35–135.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Law (including Law-Economics, Law-Artificial Intelligence dual degree)
- Economics (Finance/Economics/International Economics and Trade, etc., including multiple AI dual degrees).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Journalism and Communication (Journalism/Communication/Advertising/Broadcasting and Television, including multiple AI dual degrees)
- Chinese Language and Literature (Chinese Language and Literature/Chinese Language, including AI dual degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Social Science Experimental Class (School of International Relations and Public Affairs) (Political Science and Administration/Administrative Management/International Politics, etc.)
- Social Science Experimental Class (School of Social Development and Public Policy) (Sociology/Social Work, including AI dual degree).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, liberal arts enrollment slightly shrinks, with the ranking expected to be roughly the same as 2025 or slightly forward to about 85, with a range of 35–135. Candidates with rankings at the lower end of the range (within 35) can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors (Law, Economics); those in the middle of the range (35–85) should prioritize Tier 2 majors supplemented by Tier 1; those at the upper end of the range (85–135) are advised to use Tier 2 majors as a safety net and Tier 3 majors for stability.
